name: Red Cat Holdings, Inc.
summary: Red Cat Holdings, Inc. is a U.S.-based provider of advanced all-domain drone and robotic solutions for defense, national security, and commercial applications. The company develops American-made hardware and software supporting military, government, and public safety operations across air, land, and sea. Key products include the Black Widow and Teal 2 small unmanned aircraft systems (sUAS), the FANG drone, FlightWave Edge 130 Blue, and the SWIFT uncrewed surface vessel (USV), serving U.S. Army and allied defense customers.

products.name: Black Widow
products.description: Next-generation sUAS for U.S. Army Short Range Reconnaissance with selectable integrated AI software capabilities, purpose-built for defense and security.

products.name: Teal 2
products.description: Blue UAS Certified sUAS for combat soldiers, police, firefighters, wildlife managers, and industrial inspectors.

products.name: FANG
products.description: Small unmanned aircraft system developed under Teal Drones division.

products.name: FlightWave Edge 130 Blue
products.description: sUAS product under the FlightWave division targeting defense and commercial applications.

products.name: SWIFT
products.description: Uncrewed surface vessel (USV) providing multi-domain maritime tactical capabilities for defense applications.

products.name: Skypersonic
products.description: Drone solutions subsidiary offering unmanned systems capabilities as part of Red Cat's product family.

products.name: Propware
products.description: Software subsidiary providing drone-related software solutions under Red Cat Holdings.

partnerships.description: Certification body that awarded Teal Drones AS9100 aerospace and defense quality management certification in July 2025.

partnerships.partner_name: U.S. Army Project Management Office for Uncrewed Aircraft Systems
partnerships.description: Conducted test and evaluation leading to Teal's selection for U.S. Army Short Range Reconnaissance Program of Record.
